query:
SELECT 'completed_jobs' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM completed_jobs
UNION ALL SELECT 'completed_job_batches', COUNT(*) FROM completed_job_batches
UNION ALL SELECT 'reactivation_contacts', COUNT(*) FROM reactivation_contacts
UNION ALL SELECT 'reactivation_campaigns', COUNT(*) FROM reactivation_campaigns
UNION ALL SELECT 'always_on_enrollments', COUNT(*) FROM always_on_enrollments
UNION ALL SELECT 'always_on_groups', COUNT(*) FROM always_on_groups;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT 'completed_jobs' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM completed_jobs
UNION ALL SELECT 'completed_job_batches', COUNT(*) FROM completed_job_batches
UNION ALL SELECT 'reactivation_contacts', COUNT(*) FROM reactivation_contacts
UNION ALL SELECT 'reactivation_campaigns', COUNT(*) FROM reactivation_campaigns
UNION ALL SELECT 'always_on_enrollments', COUNT(*) FROM always_on_enrollments
UNION ALL SELECT 'always_on_groups', COUNT(*) FROM always_on_groups;
